tasks.subject: [data-path-debug-toggles] [P1] Add enableCrossClientSync and enableMessagePolling to app store
tasks.description:
Add two new persisted boolean settings to the Zustand app store in `apps/client/src/layers/shared/model/app-store.ts`.

## AppState Interface

Add after `showStatusBarTunnel` / `setShowStatusBarTunnel` (around line 127):

```typescript
enableCrossClientSync: boolean;
setEnableCrossClientSync: (v: boolean) => void;
enableMessagePolling: boolean;
setEnableMessagePolling: (v: boolean) => void;
```

## BOOL_KEYS

Add after `showStatusBarTunnel: 'dorkos-show-status-bar-tunnel'` (around line 172):

```typescript
enableCrossClientSync: 'dorkos-enable-cross-client-sync',
enableMessagePolling: 'dorkos-enable-message-polling',
```

## BOOL_DEFAULTS

Add after `showStatusBarTunnel: true` (around line 193):

```typescript
enableCrossClientSync: true,
enableMessagePolling: true,
```

## Store Implementation

Add after the `showStatusBarTunnel` setter (around line 371):

```typescript
enableCrossClientSync: readBool(BOOL_KEYS.enableCrossClientSync, BOOL_DEFAULTS.enableCrossClientSync),
setEnableCrossClientSync: (v) => {
  writeBool(BOOL_KEYS.enableCrossClientSync, v);
  set({ enableCrossClientSync: v });
},
enableMessagePolling: readBool(BOOL_KEYS.enableMessagePolling, BOOL_DEFAULTS.enableMessagePolling),
setEnableMessagePolling: (v) => {
  writeBool(BOOL_KEYS.enableMessagePolling, v);
  set({ enableMessagePolling: v });
},
```

## Reset Behavior

`resetPreferences()` already uses `...BOOL_DEFAULTS` spread, so the new keys are automatically included in reset. No changes needed.

## Acceptance Criteria

- `useAppStore.getState().enableCrossClientSync` defaults to `true`
- `useAppStore.getState().enableMessagePolling` defaults to `true`
- Setting `enableCrossClientSync` to `false` persists `'false'` to localStorage key `'dorkos-enable-cross-client-sync'`
- Setting `enableMessagePolling` to `false` persists `'false'` to localStorage key `'dorkos-enable-message-polling'`
- `resetPreferences()` restores both to `true`
- TypeScript compiles with no errors (AppState interface matches store implementation)
tasks.activeForm: Adding enableCrossClientSync and enableMessagePolling to app store

tasks.subject: [data-path-debug-toggles] [P1] Guard Message Polling with enableMessagePolling toggle
tasks.description:
Modify the TanStack Query `refetchInterval` callback in `apps/client/src/layers/features/chat/model/use-chat-session.ts` to respect the `enableMessagePolling` store value.

## Read Toggle from Store

Add after the `enableCrossClientSync` selector (from task 1.2):

```typescript
const enableMessagePolling = useAppStore((s) => s.enableMessagePolling);
```

## Guard the refetchInterval

The `historyQuery` is around line 250. Currently the `refetchInterval` callback is:

```typescript
refetchInterval: () => {
  if (isStreaming) return false;
  return isTabVisible
    ? QUERY_TIMING.ACTIVE_TAB_REFETCH_MS
    : QUERY_TIMING.BACKGROUND_TAB_REFETCH_MS;
},
```

Add one early return:

```typescript
refetchInterval: () => {
  if (isStreaming) return false;
  if (!enableMessagePolling) return false;
  return isTabVisible
    ? QUERY_TIMING.ACTIVE_TAB_REFETCH_MS
    : QUERY_TIMING.BACKGROUND_TAB_REFETCH_MS;
},
```

## Behavior

- The `refetchInterval` function captures `enableMessagePolling` from the render closure and is re-evaluated by TanStack Query on each interval tick, so toggling takes effect immediately.
- When disabled, history loads once on mount (initial query fetch) but does not periodically refetch.
- When cross-client sync is on but polling is off, `sync_update` events still trigger `queryClient.invalidateQueries()`, which causes a one-time refetch. With both off, messages arrive exclusively from the POST streaming response.

## Acceptance Criteria

- When `enableMessagePolling` is `false`, `refetchInterval` returns `false` (no periodic refetches)
- When `enableMessagePolling` is `true` (default), polling works as before (3s active, 10s background)
- Initial history load on mount still works regardless of toggle state
- Toggling takes effect immediately without page reload
tasks.activeForm: Guarding Message Polling with enableMessagePolling toggle

tasks.subject: [data-path-debug-toggles] [P2] Add Diagnostics section with toggle switches to AdvancedTab
tasks.description:
Add a "Diagnostics" section to `apps/client/src/layers/features/settings/ui/AdvancedTab.tsx` with two Switch toggles for cross-client sync and message polling. ## Current File Structure The file currently imports `Button` and `Separator` from shared UI, plus `ResetDialog` and `RestartDialog`. It renders a single `div.space-y-6` containing a danger zone `div` and two dialogs. ## Changes Update imports to add `useAppStore` from the shared model layer, plus `Switch` and `Label` from shared UI: ```tsx import { useState } from 'react'; import { TriangleAlert } from 'lucide-react'; import { Button, Label, Separator, Switch } from '@/layers/shared/ui'; import { useAppStore } from '@/layers/shared/model'; import { ResetDialog } from './ResetDialog'; import { RestartDialog } from './RestartDialog'; ``` Inside the component, before the return statement, add store selectors: ```tsx const enableCrossClientSync = useAppStore((s) => s.enableCrossClientSync); const setEnableCrossClientSync = useAppStore((s) => s.setEnableCrossClientSync); const enableMessagePolling = useAppStore((s) => s.enableMessagePolling); const setEnableMessagePolling = useAppStore((s) => s.setEnableMessagePolling); ``` In the JSX, add the Diagnostics section BEFORE the danger zone `div` (the one with `border-destructive/50`): ```tsx

Diagnostics

Toggle data synchronization paths for debugging. Disabling these reduces background network activity but may cause stale data.

Real-time updates from other clients and presence indicators

Periodic refresh of message history (3s active, 10s background)

``` No changes needed to `SettingsDialog.tsx` since `AdvancedTab` reads directly from `useAppStore`. ## Acceptance Criteria - Settings > Advanced tab shows a "Diagnostics" section with a heading and description - Two labeled Switch toggles appear: "Cross-client sync" and "Message polling" - Each toggle has a descriptive subtitle - The Diagnostics section appears above the Danger Zone - Toggles are wired to the store and take effect immediately - Both default to ON (checked) - Visual layout matches existing settings patterns (flex justify-between, gap-4, min-w-0)
tasks.activeForm: Adding Diagnostics section with toggle switches to AdvancedTab
